overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark wizard robes exploring a rustic cottage interior with exposed wooden ceiling beams, stone fireplace, and period furniture. The character walks continuously through the room, panning right to examine various objects including a broom rack, mirror, dining area, bookshelf, and sleeping quarters.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry area with broom storage and vanity mirror

events.description: approaching the fireplace area where natural light from windows becomes visible, brightening the scene

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the wall, examining the broom rack and oval mirror while moving toward the dresser

entered.detail: wall-mounted rack holding multiple brooms with straw bristles
tall freestanding oval mirror with wooden frame
dark wood chest of drawers with metal handles
small framed artwork hanging on the plaster wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins exploring a rustic interior space, walking past a wall-mounted broom rack and a tall oval mirror. The lighting is initially dim and diffused, brightening as the character approaches a stone fireplace area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining area with stone hearth and table

agents.ego_description: circling around the wooden dining table near the stone fireplace, examining the room layout

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with wooden mantel and burning embers inside
round wooden table set with plates and cutlery
wooden chairs with curved backs arranged around the table
multi-paned window with wooden frame letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a brighter dining area centered around a stone fireplace and round wooden table. Natural light streams through windows on the right wall as the character circles the furniture, with the previous entry wall now falling behind.

agents.ego_description: walking past the empty bookshelf toward the bed and wardrobe area under the loft

entered.detail: tall empty wooden bookshelf with multiple shelves
wooden railing of an upper loft level visible near the ceiling beams
large framed portraits of figures in historical dress hanging on the wall
tall wooden wardrobe cabinet with paneled doors
single bed with patterned bedspread and white pillow

segments.scene_description: The character continues exploring into a sleeping area featuring a single bed, wooden wardrobe, and large portraits on the walls. An empty bookshelf and the railing of an upper loft level become visible as the character moves deeper into the room.

agents.ego_description: approaching the upholstered armchair and coat rack near the wooden exit door

entered.detail: tufted upholstered armchair with high back near the windows
wall-mounted hooks holding colored cloths and a blue hat
heavy wooden door with iron hinges serving as the room exit
small wooden trunk at the foot of the bed

segments.scene_description: The character completes the circuit of the room by moving toward an upholstered armchair and coat rack near the exit door. The bed and wardrobe now appear on the left as the character approaches the final corner of the cottage interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic cottage interior that transitions from a dim entryway into a bright, open living and sleeping space. It begins in a dimly lit area, gliding past a wall-mounted broom rack and a tall oval mirror as the lighting gradually brightens toward a distant stone fireplace. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a sunlit dining area where natural light streams through side windows, illuminating a round wooden table. The movement then shifts deeper into the room to reveal a sleeping area with a single bed, a wooden wardrobe, and large portraits, before expanding to show an empty bookshelf and the railing of an upper loft. Finally, the camera completes its circuit by panning toward an upholstered armchair and coat rack near the exit door, leaving the sleeping quarters behind.
